notes: BEDROCK.BBS — Pennsylvania. THE_QUARRY is sysop. Queries only — every post is a question. THE_QUARRY uses the layer register from the W11 glossary. Paranoid by design; the masthead is a single fossil in shale. Two boards: the pit (general queries) and the layers (technical queries about stratigraphy/age/depth).

boards.name: the_pit
boards.subtitle: queries only · everything is a question
boards.flavor: Every thread title ends with a question mark. So does every body.

boards.name: the_layers
boards.subtitle: stratigraphy · age · depth
boards.flavor: Where the layer register is taught by example.
